ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "dominance_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant in the trial */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed in the trial */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in minutes */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the task (1-5) */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment required for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the sensor in Hz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the data point belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data point */,
  "milliseconds_since_trial_start" REAL /* Time in milliseconds since the start of the trial */,
  "x_rotation" REAL /* X-axis rotation in degrees */,
  "y_rotation" REAL /* Y-axis rotation in degrees */,
  "z_rotation" REAL /* Z-axis rotation in degrees */,
  "x_acceleration" REAL /* X-axis acceleration in m/s² */,
  "y_acceleration" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration in m/s² */,
  "z_acceleration" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration in m/s² */,
  "x_gyroscope" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope data in degrees/s */,
  "y_gyroscope" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope data in degrees/s */,
  "z_gyroscope" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope data in degrees/s */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
